dashboard.title: Farmer Dashboard
dashboard.vaults_desc: Explore opportunities, deposit assets, and watch your yields grow.
dashboard.welcome_desc: Get personalized advice on crop management, seasonal tips, vault strategies, and milestone tracking.
dashboard.no_tips_desc: Try selecting a different crop or season to see relevant farming insights.

landing.header_subtitle: Agro-finance workflows with cleaner structure and clearer data.
landing.hero_title: Consistent green-and-white styling for every core workflow.
landing.hero_subtitle: The interface now uses shared spacing, stronger typography, and a unified agro palette across navigation, cards, forms, and analytics surfaces.
landing.analytics_subtitle: Consistent padding, responsive columns, and clearer text hierarchy make the data easier to scan.

workflow.title: Empowering Agriculture
workflow.step1_desc: High-contrast green buttons reserved for the next key step.
workflow.step2_desc: Neutral surfaces reduce noise while keeping links and actions easy to spot.
workflow.step3_desc: Inputs share identical height, radius, focus state, and spacing rules.

landing.features_subtitle: A collective of farmers leveraging smart tools and sustainable practices to maximize yield and efficiency.

features.feat1_desc: AI-powered equipment monitoring and predictive maintenance for your farm operations.
features.feat2_desc: Real-time analytics on soil health, weather patterns, and yield predictions.
features.feat3_desc: Connected supply chain with transparent pricing and efficient delivery routes.
features.feat4_desc: Secure grain storage with IoT monitoring and quality preservation technology.

footer.tagline: Empowering the next generation of farmers with sustainable, transparent, and secure DeFi yields.

vaults.title: Smart Farm Vaults
vaults.subtitle: Deposit your assets into automated yield-generating strategies. Track your seasonal progress and hit milestones.

auth.login_subtitle: Sign in to review funding activity, track settlement progress, and manage orders across the platform.
auth.signup_subtitle: Create an account to start managing your agricultural finance workflows.
auth.panel_title: Cleaner workflows for agricultural finance teams.
auth.panel_subtitle: A consistent interface for farmers, buyers, and inspectors to manage orders, financing, and verification in one place.

portfolio.title: My Portfolio
portfolio.overview_desc: Track your assets, earnings, and performance across all Harvest vaults.
portfolio.transaction_desc: A detailed log of your deposits, withdrawals, and reward claims.

modals.offline_note: Offline actions will be queued automatically and synced when your connection returns.
modals.early_withdrawal_warning: Attention: Your crop cycle is not yet complete. Early withdrawal may result in reduced seasonal dividends.
